ValidationRule.description: A user other than System Administrator and Technical User can not select Abacus Inbox in Package Sub-Type
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =false, ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"AbacusInbox"), NOT($Profile.Name = "System Administrator"), NOT($Profile.Name = "P300 - Technical User 1") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to select "Abacus Inbox" for Package Sub-Type. Please contact your Super User for assistance.﻿ (PA020)
